portal.info.instructions: To access your organization's portal, navigate to your organization's unique URL. Contact your administrator if you don't know your portal link.

portal.landing.feature.orders.descriptio: Track your orders, download invoices, and view delivery status in real time.
portal.landing.feature.security.descript: Role-based permissions, session management, and full audit trail.
portal.landing.hero.description: Manage your account, view orders, and access all your resources in one place.
portal.landing.hero.title: Welcome to the Customer Portal
